name: CRUD Kategori Barang - Tambah, Edit, Hapus, Filter
description: Test CRUD lengkap: tambah kategori baru, search/filter, edit nama, hapus dengan konfirmasi modal. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, then click the login button
User is redirected to the dashboard page
Kategori Barang page is visible with a data table
Click the Tambah Kategori button to open the create modal
Fill the name field with 'Kategori CRUD Test' and fill the description field
Click the Simpan/Save button to submit the form
The new category 'Kategori CRUD Test' appears in the table
Type 'Kategori CRUD Test' in the search input to filter the table
The table is filtered and shows only the matching category
Click the edit/Ubah button on the 'Kategori CRUD Test' row
Edit modal opens with current data prefilled
Clear and fill the name field with 'Kategori CRUD Test Updated', then click Simpan
The category name is updated to 'Kategori CRUD Test Updated' in the table
Click the delete/Hapus button on the 'Kategori CRUD Test Updated' row
A confirmation modal appears asking to confirm deletion
Click the confirm Hapus button inside the confirmation modal
'Kategori CRUD Test Updated' is no longer visible in the table
